arts.ttl: ’I Wouldn’t Be Surprised’-Al Hilal CEO Makes Bold Vinicius Junior Transfer Prediction
arts.sum: Al Hilal CEO Esteve Calzada believes that the Saudi Pro League is capable of attracting any player, including Real Madrid superstar Vinícius Júnior, but has denied holding direct talks with the Brazilian. Despite this, Calzada, who previously worked in a management role for the City Football Group, believes that one day, Vinícius could wind up in the Saudi Pro League.

arts.ttl: Al-Hilal CEO confirms Saudi Arabia talks with Real Madrid star Vinicius Junior
arts.sum: Al-Hilal CEO Esteve Calzada has confirmed that Saudi Arabia have held talks with Vinicius Junior over a move to the Middle East. The Real Madrid superstar is widely expected to sign a contract extension with Los Blancos this summer. arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Al-Hilal: Predicted Lineup for Club World Cup Match
arts.sum: Defenders Dani Carvajal and Eder Militao are available, but are they ready to start after missing 6-8 months of the 2024-25 season? The Spaniard has new signings Dean Huijsen and Trent Alexander-Arnold to choose from, as well as players returning from long-term injuries.

Real Madrid play their first game under Xabi Alonso and will hope to make an immediate impact under the watchful eye of the Spaniard. Similarly, this will be Al-Hilal's first game with Simone Inzaghi...
